title: Logistics Technicians
description:
Inventory Management & Stock Control - Monitor and maintain accurate inventory levels of exercise equipment, spare parts, and supplies using warehouse management systems; conduct regular stock audits and cycle counts.

Equipment Handling & Transportation - Operate delivery vehicles with Class 3 license to transport cardio and strength machines safely to customer locations: load, unload, and position heavy equipment using proper lifting techniques and material handling equipment.

On-Site Assembly & Installation - Assemble and install various exercise equipment including treadmills, ellipticals, rowing machines, weight stations, and resistance machines directly at customer premises; ensure proper setup and functionality before handover.

Delivery Coordination & Execution - Execute timely deliveries of fitness equipment and related items to residential, commercial, and gym facilities; verify orders against delivery notes and obtain customer acknowledgment upon completion.

Preventive Maintenance Knowledge - Perform basic maintenance checks on fitness equipment to ensure optimal functionality; identify wear and tear on components and escalate technical issues appropriately.

Warehouse Operations - Organize storage areas efficiently to maximize space utilization; prepare equipment for dispatch, package items securely, and maintain cleanliness and safety standards in the warehouse.

Documentation & Record Keeping - Maintain accurate delivery logs, equipment condition reports, and inventory records; process shipping documentation, collect customer signatures, and update tracking systems in a timely manner.

Route Planning & Time Management - Plan and execute efficient delivery routes to multiple customer locations; coordinate with customers regarding delivery windows, installation appointments, and access requirements.

Safety Compliance - Adhere to workplace safety protocols, manual handling guidelines, and traffic regulations; conduct pre-trip vehicle inspections and ensure safe equipment handling at customer sites.

Customer Service & Problem-Solving - Interact professionally with clients during deliveries and installations; provide basic product information, usage guidance, and troubleshoot logistical challenges such as access constraints or scheduling conflicts independently.

postedCompany.description:
REFLEX-O RECREATIONS PTE LTD

Established in 1985, Reflex-O distributes a wide range of 'Best In Kind' fitness equipment and accessories for commercial gyms, condominums, clubs, hospitality groups, physiotherapist, schools, government departments and fitness facilities for all ages.

Together with our sister company, Active Lifestyle, we are a leading distributor of a number of premium brands throughout China, Hongkong and S.E. Asia.
postedCompany.name: REFLEX-O RECREATIONS PTE LTD
